misc: Waters the course more than the course sprinklers.
biography: Pekka, representing Espoo Ringside Golf, is set to embark on his eighth competitive journey in the esteemed Hector Trophée at the upcoming 2026 edition. A familiar and respected figure on the greens, Pekka has previously demonstrated his capacity for team success, having guided his pairing to claim the coveted Hector Trophée on one memorable occasion.

Throughout his seven prior participations, Pekka has consistently brought a tenacious spirit to the fairways. While the individual Victor Trophy has thus far remained elusive, his singular triumph in the pair format underscores his ability to contribute decisively when teamed with a partner, navigating the rigorous demands of this prestigious competition.

Pekka's approach to the game is often characterized by an unparalleled dedication, a trait humorously noted by his peers who often observe that he waters the course more effectively than the official irrigation system. This commitment to the game, coupled with his enduring presence, signifies a player who remains deeply invested in the spirit and challenge of the Hector Trophée as he continues his active involvement in Hector events.
